What We Do

Our Services

From installation to emergency repairs, Bluefin covers everything air-con and electrical for homes and businesses across NSW.

Air Conditioning Installation

Supply and install split systems, ducted units, and multi-head systems for homes and commercial spaces. All major brands stocked.

Split SystemsDucted UnitsMulti-Head SystemsAll Brands

Air Con Servicing & Repairs

Regular maintenance, gas top-ups, filter cleans, and fault diagnosis to keep your system running at peak efficiency year-round.

Annual ServicingGas RechargesFault DiagnosisFilter Cleans

Electrical Work

Licensed electricians for residential and commercial fit-outs, switchboard upgrades, power points, lighting, and safety inspections.

Switchboard UpgradesPower PointsLightingSafety Checks

Emergency Callouts

Electrical faults and air con breakdowns don't wait — neither do we. Fast response emergency service across NSW when you need it most.

24/7 AvailabilityFast ResponseAll NSWNo Call-Out Delays
Get a quote for any service→
The Bluefin Difference

Why Choose Us?

We're not just another tradie business. Here's what sets Bluefin apart from the competition.

100%

Fully Covered

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed electricians and air-con techs. Work covered by full public liability insurance for your complete peace of mind.

Local

NSW Based

Local NSW Tradies

We live and work right here in NSW. No call centres, no sub-contractors — just your local team who know the area.

Same

Day Response

Fast Response

Same-day bookings available. For emergencies, we aim to be on-site within hours — not days. Your comfort can't wait.

100%

Satisfaction

Quality Guaranteed

We stand behind every job with a workmanship guarantee. If something's not right, we come back and fix it. No arguments.

Contractor Licence: 982390C
Electrical Licence: L191263
Simple Process

How It Works

Getting the job done shouldn't be complicated. Here's exactly what to expect when you work with Bluefin.

01

Call Us

Give us a ring on 0428 631 931 or fill in the contact form. Tell us what you need and where you are — we'll listen and ask the right questions.

02

We Quote

We'll provide a clear, upfront quote with no hidden costs. For most jobs we can quote over the phone or via a quick site visit.

03

Job Done

Our licensed technicians arrive on time, complete the work to the highest standard, and clean up before they leave. Simple as that.

Ready to get started?

Call now for a free, no-obligation quote.

0428 631 931
Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Don't take our word for it — here's what local NSW homeowners and businesses have to say about Bluefin.

5.0 Average Rating· Google Reviews

“Bluefin installed a new ducted system in our home and the whole process was seamless. They arrived on time, the install was super clean, and the team were friendly and professional. Highly recommend to anyone in the area!”

SM

Sarah M.

Penrith, NSW

Ducted A/C Installation

“Called them on a Friday afternoon when my split system stopped working in 38-degree heat. They were at my house within a couple of hours and had it fixed before dinner. Brilliant service, fair price. Will definitely use again.”

JR

Jason R.

Parramatta, NSW

Emergency A/C Repair

“We had them do a full switchboard upgrade and install new power points throughout the house. The work was neat, tidy, and passed inspection first go. Very knowledgeable team who explained everything clearly. Top tradies.”

TH

The Hendersons

Blacktown, NSW

Electrical & Switchboard
